message:
fix(ftui-extras, ftui-pty): terminal emulator correctness — SGR clamping, wide chars, line flags, OSC ST

SGR color parameter clamping (parser.rs):
- Clamp 256-color and RGB SGR parameters with .clamp(0, 255) before u8
  cast instead of direct truncating cast, preventing malformed escape
  sequences from producing incorrect colors

Wide character overflow protection (state.rs):
- Switch 3 cursor-X arithmetic operations to saturating_add/saturating_sub
  for wide-character wrap threshold, continuation-cell placement, and
  dirty marking
- Use saturating_sub in ClearRegion::CursorToEnd mark_rect to prevent
  underflow at region boundaries

Line flag safe access (state.rs):
- Replace direct self.grid.line_flags[y as usize] indexing with
  self.grid.line_flag(src_y) and self.grid.set_line_flag(y, ...) accessor
  methods in scroll-up/scroll-down to enforce bounds checking

OSC String Terminator parsing (virtual_terminal.rs):
- Implement correct two-byte ESC+\ ST sequence: ESC inside an OSC now
  transitions to OscEscapeSeen state, only subsequent \ dispatches the
  OSC, any other byte dispatches OSC and re-enters Escape state
- Extend scrollback test to assert scroll_up pushes scrolled-out lines
  into scrollback regardless of scroll region start row

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
